reviews.comment:
Rápida atención. Además, el café tiene promo con medialunas o biscochitos. Los pastelitos muy buenos ($140)

(Translated by Google)
Fast service. Plus, the coffee shop has a special offer with croissants or biscuits. The pastries are very good ($140).

reviews.comment:
Nos quedamos a dormir xq se nos hizo tarde para la ruta. Tranquilo, pasan autos pero se puede descansar. Atención super amable, y rápida. En mis viajes volvería....

(Translated by Google)
We stayed overnight because we were running late for the trip. It was quiet, with cars passing by, but you could rest. The service was super friendly and quick. I would definitely return on my travels....

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Pocos surtidores, se forma larga cola de vehículos sobre el costado de la ruta. Algo peligroso. Los sanitarios un lujo!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Few pumps, so a long line of vehicles forms on the side of the road. A bit dangerous. The restrooms are fantastic!
